expected_records.title: Purple Martin Nest Checks
expected_records.description: BEGINNING MARCH 23! Join a conservation expert from Disney’s Animals, Science and Environment team as they study these birds as part of their ongoing efforts to help protect the purple martins.

description.text: BEGINNING MARCH 23! Join a conservation expert from
Disney’s Animals, Science and Environment team as they
study these birds as part of their ongoing efforts to help
protect the purple martins.

expected_records.title: Community Hall
expected_records.description: Join us to create one-of-a-kind crafts, borrow your favorite sports equipment, and more! Fees may apply.

description.text: Join us to create one-of-a-kind crafts, borrow your favorite
sports equipment, and more! Fees may apply.

expected_records.title: Disney Fit Yoga
expected_records.description: Ground yourself with a gentle yoga session to start your day. Designed for all skill levels, this experience incorporates various poses set to your favorite Disney music!

description.text: Ground yourself with a gentle yoga session to
start your day. Designed for all skill levels, this
experience incorporates various poses set to your
favorite Disney music!

expected_records.title: Poolside Activities
expected_records.description: Soak in the sun with some family-friendly activities, both in and out of the water. See a Recreation Cast Member for more information.

description.text: Soak in the sun with some family-friendly activities, both
in and out of the water. See a Recreation Cast Member

expected_records.title: Storytime Yoga
expected_records.description: Get active with a session inspired by some of your Disney Friends! All ages and skill levels welcome.

description.text: Get active with a session inspired by some
of your Disney Friends! All ages and skill

expected_records.title: Mickey Tie-Dye
expected_records.schedule_text: Sunday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Friday and Saturday from 2:30pm-3:30pm
expected_records.description: Get creative with a Disney twist on this arts and crafts favorite!

description.text: Get creative with a Disney twist on this arts and crafts favorite!

expected_records.title: Find A Friend
expected_records.description: Search the Resort for a hidden Maximus photo prop. Once located, snap a photo and then head to Community Hall to receive a surprise!

description.text: Search the Resort for a hidden Maximus photo
prop. Once located, snap a photo and then head
to Community Hall to receive a surprise!

expected_records.title: Campfire
expected_records.location: Disney Vacation Club® Courtyard at Franklin Square
expected_records.description: Enjoy the warm glow of the campfire with complimentary marshmallows. S’mores kits available for purchase.

location.text: Disney Vacation Club® Courtyard at Franklin Square

description.text: Enjoy the warm glow of the campfire with complimentary

expected_records.title: Glow With The Flow
expected_records.description: Light the night with our evening poolside activities.

description.text: Light the night with our evening poolside activities.

expected_records.title: Bicycle Rentals
expected_records.description: Choose from individual bikes to two- or four-person surrey bikes for a fun family outing!

description.text: Choose from individual bikes to two- or four-person

expected_records.title: Nighttime Bingo
expected_records.description: Bring the family together for an unforgettable night full of fun and prizes!

description.text: Bring the family together for an unforgettable night full of

expected_records.title: Winner’s Circle Mosaics
expected_records.location: The Turf Club Bar and Grill
expected_records.description: Immerse yourself in a famous art tradition as you design your own mosaic showpiece with a touch of Disney flair. This experience is recommended for Guests ages 12 and up. Space is limited. To book, visit or call the Community Hall at 407-827-4589.

location.text: The Turf Club Bar and Grill

description.text: Immerse yourself in a famous art tradition as you design
your own mosaic showpiece with a touch of Disney flair.
This experience is recommended for Guests ages 12 and up.
Space is limited. To book, visit or call the Community Hall

expected_records.title: Win, Paint, Show!
expected_records.description: Get in touch with your inner artist in this unique 2-hour instructor-led painting class! This experience is recommended for Guests ages 12 and up. Space is limited. To book, visit or call the Community Hall at 407-827-4589.

description.text: Get in touch with your inner artist in this unique
